name: @celestia/tairitsu
description: Tairitsu - WASM Component Model web framework (monorepo root)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @celestia/tairitsu-browser-glue && npm run build -w @celestia/tairitsu-runtime
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @celestia/tairitsu-browser-glue && npm run clean -w @celestia/tairitsu-runtime
